overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a Mediterranean-style medieval village with terracotta roofs, descending through stone archways into a bustling harbor market, and boarding a wooden sailing ship. The clip features bright sunny lighting characteristic of the Toussaint region with teal skies and warm stone textures.

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow sunlit village street lined with whitewashed stone cottages with terracotta roofs. A wooden hand cart sits parked on the left while stacked crates line the right wall. The character approaches and descends a short flight of stone stairs, transitioning to a lower level of the village.

scene_state.functional_zone: courtyard with stone archways and covered walkways

events.description: passing through stone archway into more open courtyard area with central tree

agents.ego_description: walking through covered archways and emerging into a sunlit courtyard with a large tree

entered.detail: stone archway passage with brick trim leading to lower village areas
two-story stone building with distinctive blue wooden window shutters
elevated wooden walkway with railings running along the right side
mature leafy tree with gnarled trunk in the center of the courtyard

segments.scene_description: The character passes through a stone archway tunnel into a sunlit courtyard dominated by a large olive tree. A two-story stone building with blue shutters stands on the left while a covered wooden walkway runs along the right. The cobblestone path continues through this transitional space between the upper village and the harbor below.

scene_state.functional_zone: harbor entrance with market stalls and ship masts visible

events.description: emerging from stone archway into open harbor area with ships and market stalls
crowd density increases as character enters busy harbor market area

agents.ego_description: walking through the main harbor archway into the bustling dock area with market activity

notable_agents.action: market vendor standing beside wooden stall with canvas awning

entered.detail: large decorative stone archway marking the entrance to the harbor district
multiple tall wooden masts of docked sailing ships visible against the sky
market stall with canvas awning and wooden frame selling goods
tall rectangular tower with red brick facade and small windows

segments.scene_description: The character passes through the grand stone harbor archway into a wide open dock area. Tall ship masts rise in the distance against the teal sky while market stalls with canvas awnings line the right side. The crowd density increases with dock workers and villagers browsing goods, and a distinctive red brick tower stands visible on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden docks with cargo barrels and ship gangplanks

events.description: stepping onto wooden gangplank and boarding the sailing ship

agents.ego_description: walking along the wooden docks past cargo piles and boarding a ship via the gangplank

notable_agents.action: shirtless dock worker sitting on cargo crate near the ship hull

entered.detail: weathered wooden planks forming the dock walkway with gaps between boards
stacks of wooden barrels and sacks piled on the dock edge
sloped wooden ramp leading from dock to the ship's main deck
wooden ship hull with decorative carvings and rope rigging visible

segments.scene_description: The character walks along weathered wooden docks lined with cargo barrels and sacks. Passing a seated dock worker, the character steps onto the wooden gangplank and boards the sailing ship. The ship's carved wooden hull and rigging become prominent as the character transitions from the dock to the vessel's deck.

scene_state.functional_zone: sailing ship deck with view of lake and distant castle

events.description: ascending wooden stairs from main deck to upper deck near the ship's wheel
emerging from shadow of sails into bright sunlight overlooking the calm water

agents.ego_description: walking across the ship deck, ascending stairs to the upper deck, and looking out over the water toward a distant castle

entered.detail: thick wooden mast with rigging ropes and pulleys rising from the deck
steep wooden staircase leading up to the ship's helm and upper deck
large wooden ship's wheel with metal fittings at the stern upper deck
castle with towers visible across the calm lake in the distance
calm reflective water surface of the harbor with gentle ripples

segments.scene_description: The character explores the wooden deck of the sailing ship, passing the main mast and rigging. Ascending the stairs to the upper deck, the character reaches the ship's wheel and looks out over the calm lake water toward a distant castle on the horizon. The deck is empty, offering an unobstructed view of the surrounding mountains and water.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the quiet, sunlit streets of a Mediterranean village down to the expansive deck of a sailing ship. It begins by navigating a narrow lane of whitewashed cottages and terracotta roofs, descending a short flight of stone stairs to reach a lower level. The camera then passes through a stone archway tunnel into a courtyard shaded by a large olive tree before moving through a grand harbor archway that opens into a bustling dock area filled with market stalls and tall ship masts. As the character walks along weathered wooden piers lined with cargo barrels, the scene shifts from the crowded harbor to the wooden gangplank of a vessel. Finally, the movement ascends the ship's stairs to the upper deck, passing the rigging to reach the wheel and look out over calm lake waters toward a distant castle and mountains.
